rows.label: tev018801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Wolf about positioning during combat.

rows.label: tev018801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Wolf if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Wolf how to overwhelm your foes.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Wolf if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Wolf how to use taunt Arts wisely.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Wolf if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Wolf how to further overwhelm your foes.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Wolf if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Wolf about the different Doll Overclock systems.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask Wolf if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask Wolf what he thinks about you.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0121
rows.name: Ask Wolf if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev018801_SEL0131
rows.name: Ask Wolf if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Any fool who's dumb enough to face his foe head-on
won't live to make the same mistake twice. You must
constantly move to stay in your opponent's blind spots![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Attack your foe from the back!
Attack it from on high or
below! Anywhere but head-on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Attacking from any of those positions
will improve your accuracy and your
odds of landing a critical hit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Do you understand? Do you not understand? Either
way, repeat what I just said a thousand times until
it finally penetrates that thick skull of yours![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0009
rows.name:
I lovingly instruct BLADE rookies that don't
even know the basics of combat until they
grow into respectable BLADE operatives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0010
rows.name:
But recently, a number of cowards
have failed to withstand my love
and fled my training sessions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0011
rows.name:
But you look like the
type that can take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0012
rows.name:
If you decide to join BLADE, you come and
ask me anything. I will take the fundamentals
of combat and beat them right into you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0017
rows.name:
If that's your goal, you want to topple
them. You'll never miss a toppled foe,
and the effect is obscenely powerful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0018
rows.name:
But to set up a topple, you first
gotta stagger your foe. Now shut
yer yap-hole and remember this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0019
rows.name:
Once a foe has been staggered, if you then
hit them with an Art that has the topple
effect, you'll always topple them. Nice, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0020
rows.name:
But an even more powerful way
to control your foes is with
a Doll's bind maneuver.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0021
rows.name:
They may actually let you pilot a Doll one day,
so in anticipation of that, remember my words.
...And it could be a while, so write it down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0022
rows.name:
Follow a stagger with a topple! And if
you're in a Doll, it's stagger into bind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0023
rows.name:
When you get used to using your secondary
cooldown strategically, you'll be able
to challenge stronger foes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0024
rows.name:
Rookies panic and use all their Arts as
soon as they are ready to be cast. This
is a serious matter of concern for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0025
rows.name:
You see, some Arts are more effective the
longer you hold out. Watch their cooldown
gauges carefully to see what I mean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0026
rows.name:
You're the one responsible for setting your own Arts,
so you should strive to know all their effects both at
their primary and secondary cooldown gauge levels.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0031
rows.name:
Taunts are a way to attract
an enemy's attention in order
to protect your comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0032
rows.name:
They are NOT Arts for wannabe heroes to
use when they're at the brink of death![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0033
rows.name:
It is better to use them early
in the battle when you aren't
under intense pressure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0034
rows.name: A taunted foe enters the flinch state.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0035
rows.name:
Do it right when your foe is about to use
a powerful attack, because a flinch can
head off such a move. Remember that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0038
rows.name:
When you set your skills, their effects occur innately.
You don't have to trigger them like you do with Arts.
Why is that so hard for you idiots to understand?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0039
rows.name: Hmph. And what about you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0040
rows.name:
Have you set your skills? Are
you strengthening your skills?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0041
rows.name:
If you neglect either, combat will go
badly for you! Beat that into your
fool heads and don't embarrass me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0046
rows.name:
Hmm... Well, I'm sure you're
beyond basic stagger- and-topple
tactics at this point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0047
rows.name:
Do you remember about using bind? ...Well?! Do you?!
I sure remember telling you about it, and in a loud
enough voice that I damn well know you heard me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0048
rows.name:
When you're piloting a Doll and
you stagger your enemy, immediately
use bind! Immediately![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0049
rows.name:
Then your foe will be completely
immobilized and you can torment
it to your heart's content![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0051
rows.name:
What? You're going to embarrass me by
claiming Overclock chains are too hard
to understand? They couldn't be easier![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0052
rows.name:
If you want to dish out big
damage, chain attack-type colors![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0053
rows.name:
If you want to maintain Overclock for
longer, chain support-type colors![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0054
rows.name:
Which are the attack-type
colors? Orange is melee! Yellow
is ranged! Purple is debuff![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0055
rows.name:
Which are the support-type colors? Green
is buffs and blue is auras! ...Intuitive,
right? So remember it intuitively![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0059
rows.name:
I think it's time you learned
about the differences between
Doll model capabilities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0060
rows.name:
The installed Overclock
system varies by Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0061
rows.name:
The Nagi greatly reduces damage
received, while the Hagane
strengthens your melee attacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0062
rows.name:
If you're new at this, you
can always pick your Doll
based on its Overclock system.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0063
rows.name:
But no matter how strong a Doll is, it
don't mean diddly-crap unless the pilot
has good judgment. So tread carefully![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0065
rows.name:
A lot of idiots get too used to fighting mock
Doll battles and forget to watch their fuel
consumption. And that's why I have migraines![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0066
rows.name:
When you're training at the Arms
test hangar, you can get resupplied
as soon as you run out of gas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0067
rows.name:
But who do you think's gonna come give you a fill-up
when you run out of gas outside of NLA and end up
surrounded by dangerous enemies? Your MAMA?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0068
rows.name:
You can't very well pilot your Doll when you are out
of fuel, can you? So you're gonna be in for a tough
fight unless you manage your fuel consumption![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0069
rows.name:
A smart fighter uses weapons that consume large amounts
of fuel during Overclock, when fuel costs are reduced
to zero. So get that through your thick head![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0071
rows.name:
You wanna know what I think
about you, do you, [ST:playername ]?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0072
rows.name:
...Well, I can't even count the number of
BLADEs I've trained, but I've never enjoyed
watching one grow as much as you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0073
rows.name:
How's that amnesia of yours doing,
anyway? ...Still can't remember
anything, huh? Damn shame.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0074
rows.name:
As strong a fighter as you are, I
figure I would remember you from
back on the White Whale. Hmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0075
rows.name:
Well, there's nothing special about
your amnesia here. Everybody gets
to have a new life here on Mira![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0080
rows.name:
So what do you think of this face
of mine, mmm? Manly? Gentle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0081
rows.name:
Give it to me straight. I don't want you pulling
any punches. What about the scar? Rugged? Scary?
You wanna know what mighty enemy gave me this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0082
rows.name:
This face is what got me the job as instructor. This
face is what earns me the fear of my students. I can
tell you this because I know Nagi trusts you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0083
rows.name:
So this scar? I got it when I was 17
years old. Took a bad spill when I was
hot-dogging on my damn snowboard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0084
rows.name:
If I'd stayed slim and handsome like some teen
movie star, where do you think I'd be now, huh?
How different do you think my life would be?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0091
rows.name:
This face is what got me the job as instructor. This
face is what earns me the fear of my students. I can
tell you this because I know Nagi trusts you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0092
rows.name:
How different do you think my life would
be today if I was slim and handsome, huh?
Sometimes I get to thinking about that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0093
rows.name:
And when I do, I can hear the devil whispering in my
ear. Straight from the hell that's deep below the
lower level of this here administrative district![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0094
rows.name:
He whispers that I should be who I want to be,
even if it's only for the short time until we
return to our old bodies from the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0095
rows.name:
And that whispering devil's
name...is Yardley.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018801_MSG0096
rows.name:
But I'm the man who teaches young BLADEs!
Even though I probably never would have
gotten this job if it wasn't for my face...[ST:wait ]
